section_anchor: The production pattern: post-close dip is expected
brief_summary: A horizontal timeline spanning March 2026 through July 2026 with three DCS group-buy windows rendered as adjacent labeled bands. DCS Olivetti in warm-grey from March 27 to April 13; DCS Grass Valley in ochre from May 1 to June 1; DCS Dolch in dark warm-grey from June 1 to July 1. The shared edge between Grass Valley and Dolch at June 1 is the visual emphasis — the handoff moment. Month markers on a baseline rule below the bands.
